titles.title: He Stood the Test of Time

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v4 v9 v4 v10 v11 v12

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a promise in the bible, God's precious holy word, That all things work together, for-good-to-them that-love The Lord. (Love the Lord)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And today I claim this promise, trust in Him (aaaah) for peace of mind

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Everyone with blending: He's the God that through the ages has stood the test of time

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: What a blessed assurance to know I'm His and he's mine What a sweet consolation when he tells me I'm his child How could I ever doubt him when-mountains get too hard to climb, He's the God of all mountains, He's stood the test of time.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Through this worlds raging battles, I-will-trust him more and more, I dare not take one step without him, until this lonely life is o'er.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: For the hand that holds tomorrow that same hand (aahhh) is holding mine, Praise his Name throughout the ages, God has stood the test of time.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: What a blessed assurance to know I'm His and he's mine, What a sweet consolation when he tells me I’m-his-child, How could I ever doubt him, when-mountains get too hard to climb He's the God of all mountains, He's stood the test of time.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: What a blessed assurance to know I'm His and he's mine.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: What a sweet consolation when he tells me I’m-his-child How could I ever doubt him when-mountains get too hard to climb He's the God of all mountains, He's stood the test of time.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: How could I ever doubt him when-mountains get too hard to climb He's the God of all mountains, The God of all mountains, He’s the God of all mountains, that stood the test… of time
